Name: Speech Of The World
Description: The Garou may speak and read any living language they encounter, though they probably speak it with an obvious accent. Given time, they are also able to understand some parts of dead languages, though the user is unable to pierce any intentional code or other form of obfuscation. A parrot-spirit grants this Gift.
System: Upon the werewolf’s encountering a language they do not normally speak, the player can make an Intelligence + Wisdom test against a Difficulty based on how common the language is. (Chinese or any variant of Arabic, for example, would be 2, a tablet written in an obscure dialect of Sumerian 4, and runes etched by unknown hand before the dawn of humankind 5 and beyond.) This Gift can be used in any form (though intelligible speech is possible only in homid or glabro)
